zh.lifeSummary: 當Maredudd Tudur於大約1365年出生在威爾士安格萊米德時，他的父親TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY52歲，母親Margred Marged ferch Thomas36歲。他於1399年與MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1394年登記服兵役。他去世於1406年2月4日在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maredudd Tudur于大约1365年出生在威尔士安格萊米德时，他的父亲TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY52岁，母亲Margred Marged ferch Thomas36岁。他于1399年与MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1394年登记服兵役。他去世于1406年2月4日在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Tudur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tudor
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

en.lifeSummary: When Maredudd Tudur was born about 1365, in Penmynydd, Anglesey, Wales, his father, TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY, was 52 and his mother, Margred Marged ferch Thomas, was 36. He married MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN in 1399. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1394. He died on 4 February 1406, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maredudd Tudur est né environ 1365, à Penmynydd, Anglesey, Galles, son père, TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margred Marged ferch Thomas, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN en 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1394. Il est décédé le 4 février 1406, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maredudd Tudur um 1365 in Penmynydd, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY 52 und seine Mutter Margred Marged ferch Thomas 36. Er hat 1399 MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1394 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 4. Februar 1406 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maredudd Tudur è nato il circa 1365 nel Penmynydd, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Margred Marged ferch Thomas, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN nel 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1394. Morì il 4 febbraio 1406, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maredudd Tudurが約1365年にウェールズアングレセイペンムイニーッドで生まれた時，父TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWYは52歳，母Margred Marged ferch Thomasは36歳であった。1399年にMARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHANと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1394年に兵役登録をした。彼は1406年2月4日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maredudd Tudur(이)가 대략 1365년 웨일스 앤글레시 펜미니드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred Marged ferch Thomas(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1399년 MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1394년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1406년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maredudd Tudur nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Penmynydd, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Margred Marged ferch Thomas, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN em 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1394. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1406, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maredudd Tudur родился около 1365 г. в местности пенминидд, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margred Marged ferch Thomas, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN в 1399 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1394 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 4 февраля 1406 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maredudd Tudur nació aproximadamente 1365, en Penmynydd, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Margred Marged ferch Thomas, tenía 36 años. Se casó con MARGARET verch DAFYDD VYCHAN en 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1394. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1406, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
